title: taraxacum anguliferum
intro: Taraxacum anguliferum, also known as the angled dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum anguliferum include its potential to reduce blood pressure, improve digestion, and act as a natural diuretic. Taraxacum anguliferum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine and natural remedies.
